src: The official repo for [NeurIPS'21] "ViTAE: Vision Transformer Advanced by Exploring Intrinsic Inductive Bias" and [IJCV'22] "ViTAEv2: Vision Transformer Advanced by Exploring Inductive Bias for Image Recognition and Beyond"
